title: The hidden system behind every Renaissance trial - Ada Palmer
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews historian Ada Palmer about legal systems and hidden structures in Renaissance trials. This is a historical discussion that does not directly address AI industry topics.
writeup: Dwarkesh Patel interviews historian Ada Palmer about the legal systems and hidden structures that shaped Renaissance trials. The conversation is historical in focus and does not directly address AI industry topics. The takeaway is an account of how procedural mechanisms operated beneath the surface of Renaissance-era justice.
